title: Build proof-bound iteration dossiers
acceptance: Each story view joins asked, decided, contract, done, verified, and release records only through explicit canonical linkage.
Trace rationale_summary remains separately visible in the browser narrative.
Cross-story evidence cannot leak into another dossier and missing links remain explicit diagnostics.
The installed plugin renders the dossier responsively and preserves raw evidence access without an LLM runtime.
